name: Rex, Freight Fur Hire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>空</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>積</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>荷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>に</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> レクス
name_jp_tl: Rex, Freight of the Skyfang Brigade
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 Spell/Trap "Fur Hire" from your Deck to your hand. During the Main Phase, if you control a monster "Fur Hire" (Quick Effect): You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card "Fur Hire" in your GY; either add it to your hand, or Special Summon it if it was a monster. You can only use each effect of "Rex, Freight Fur Hire" once per turn.
